title: Stable data-mod workflow and localization completeness
summary: Harden data-mod validation, non-code-mod restrictions, content localization and completeness reports for 1.0.
acceptance: Produces content and localization completeness report for M8
Validates data-mod workflow and keeps code mods forbidden
Rejects unsafe paths, oversized assets, unknown references and missing localization
Covers zh-CN/en content labels and public-facing text
Does not permit executable mods, networking, platform APIs or final public claims

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Added M8 content/localization completeness inventory and a focused missing-reference regression; unsafe-path, oversized-asset, missing-localization and code-mod restrictions remain fail-closed; required checks passed using corepack pnpm 11.8.0 after the local pnpm 11.7.0 shim mismatch.

changes_requested: High: zh-CN/en content localization is documented but not gated; validateM5ContentPack accepts a complete pack with manifest.locales=[en] and no zh/zh-CN locale file, so missing required Chinese content coverage can pass. Required checks otherwise passed.

Added fail-closed required-locale validation for English plus Chinese locale resources, kept the protected M5 baseline intact, and added focused regressions for missing references and missing locale coverage; pnpm shim mismatch noted, corepack pnpm gates passed.

changes_requested: High: required-locale probes for missing Chinese and missing en now fail closed, but legacy zh compatibility is not scoped to protected M5 fixtures; validateM5ContentPack still accepts manifest.locales=[en,zh-CN] with only locales/zh.json and no zh-CN file, allowing new M8 packs to bypass canonical zh-CN resources. Required gates passed.
Closed the zh-CN bypass, kept legacy zh only for packs that explicitly declare zh, and reran content, test, handoff, taskctl, diff, and quality gates.

verified: No blocking findings. Targeted probes confirmed declared zh-CN now requires locales/zh-CN.*, en-only and missing-en packs fail closed, and legacy zh compatibility only passes when manifest declares zh; required review gates passed with corepack pnpm 11.8.0.
Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: content:validate, test, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Targeted probes confirmed declared zh-CN now requires locales/zh-CN.*, en-only and missing-en packs fail closed, and legacy zh compatibility only passes when manifest declares zh; required review gates passed with corepack pnpm 11.8.0.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: content:validate, test, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
